mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_info.`is_pay` = '0' AND mall_order_info.`status` IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `waitPayCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_info.`status` = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `waitDeliveryCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_info.`status` = '2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `waitReceiveCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_info.`status` = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `finishedCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_info.`status` = '5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `cancelCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN after_sale_stat.`has_processing_after_sale` = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `processingAfterSaleCount` FROM mall_order_info mall_order_info LEFT JOIN ( SELECT mall_order_item.`order_id`, MAX(CASE WHEN mall_order_item.`status` IN ('1', '3') AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `has_processing_after_sale` FROM mall_order_item mall_order_item WHERE mall_order_item.`del_flag` = '0' GROUP BY mall_order_item.`order_id` ) after_sale_stat ON after_sale_stat.`order_id` = mall_order_info.`id` WHERE mall_order_info.`del_flag` = '0'

SELECT COUNT(1) AS `totalUserCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_user.`member_flag` = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `memberCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_user.`member_flag` = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `nonMemberCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_user.`register_time` >= #{todayStart} AND mall_user.`register_time` < #{todayEnd} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `todayNewUserCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_user.`member_flag` = '1' AND mall_user.`member_time` >= #{todayStart} AND mall_user.`member_time` < #{todayEnd} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `todayNewMemberCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_user.`last_login_time` >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `activeUser7Count`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_user.`last_login_time` >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `activeUser30Count`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_user.`consume_count` > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `consumeUserCount` FROM mall_user mall_user WHERE mall_user.`del_flag` = '0'

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_goods_spu mall_goods_spu WHERE mall_goods_spu.`del_flag` = '0') AS `totalGoodsCount`, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_goods_spu mall_goods_spu WHERE mall_goods_spu.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_spu.`shelf` = '1') AS `onShelfGoodsCount`, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_goods_spu mall_goods_spu WHERE mall_goods_spu.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_spu.`shelf` = '0') AS `offShelfGoodsCount`, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0') AS `totalSkuCount`, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_sku.`enable` = '1') AS `enabledSkuCount`, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(mall_goods_sku.`stock`, 0)), 0) FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_sku.`enable` = '1') AS `totalStock`, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_sku.`enable` = '1' AND COALESCE(mall_goods_sku.`stock`, 0) <= 10) AS `warningSkuCount`, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT mall_goods_sku.`spu_id` FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_sku.`enable` = '1' GROUP BY mall_goods_sku.`spu_id` HAVING COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(mall_goods_sku.`stock`, 0)), 0) <= 0 ) sold_out_goods) AS `soldOutGoodsCount`

SELECT COUNT(1) AS `totalCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_item.`status` = '1' AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `applyingCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_item.`status` = '2' AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `rejectCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_item.`status` = '3' AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `waitingRefundCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `refundedCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '1' THEN mall_order_item.`payment_price` ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `refundAmount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '1' AND mall_order_item.`refund_success_time` >= #{todayStart} AND mall_order_item.`refund_success_time` < #{todayEnd} THEN mall_order_item.`payment_price` ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `todayRefundAmount` FROM mall_order_item mall_order_item WHERE mall_order_item.`del_flag` = '0' AND ( (mall_order_item.`status` IN ('1', '2', '3') AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0') OR mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '1' )

WITH RECURSIVE date_list AS ( SELECT #{beginDate} AS `stat_date` UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(`stat_date`, INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM date_list WHERE `stat_date` < #{endDate} ) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(date_list.`stat_date`, '%Y-%m-%d') AS `statDate`, DATE_FORMAT(date_list.`stat_date`, '%m-%d') AS `dateLabel`, COALESCE(order_stat.`orderCount`, 0) AS `orderCount`, COALESCE(order_stat.`paidOrderCount`, 0) AS `paidOrderCount`, COALESCE(order_stat.`paidAmount`, 0) AS `paidAmount`, COALESCE(refund_stat.`refundAmount`, 0) AS `refundAmount`, COALESCE(user_stat.`newUserCount`, 0) AS `newUserCount`, COALESCE(member_stat.`newMemberCount`, 0) AS `newMemberCount` FROM date_list LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(mall_order_info.`create_time`) AS `statDate`, COUNT(1) AS `orderCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_info.`is_pay` = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `paidOrderCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN mall_order_info.`is_pay` = '1' THEN mall_order_info.`payment_price` ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `paidAmount` FROM mall_order_info mall_order_info WHERE mall_order_info.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_order_info.`create_time` >= #{beginTime} AND mall_order_info.`create_time` < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(mall_order_info.`create_time`) ) order_stat ON order_stat.`statDate` = date_list.`stat_date` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(mall_order_item.`refund_success_time`) AS `statDate`, COALESCE(SUM(mall_order_item.`payment_price`), 0) AS `refundAmount` FROM mall_order_item mall_order_item WHERE mall_order_item.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '1' AND mall_order_item.`refund_success_time` IS NOT NULL AND mall_order_item.`refund_success_time` >= #{beginTime} AND mall_order_item.`refund_success_time` < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(mall_order_item.`refund_success_time`) ) refund_stat ON refund_stat.`statDate` = date_list.`stat_date` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(mall_user.`register_time`) AS `statDate`, COUNT(1) AS `newUserCount` FROM mall_user mall_user WHERE mall_user.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_user.`register_time` IS NOT NULL AND mall_user.`register_time` >= #{beginTime} AND mall_user.`register_time` < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(mall_user.`register_time`) ) user_stat ON user_stat.`statDate` = date_list.`stat_date` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(mall_user.`member_time`) AS `statDate`, COUNT(1) AS `newMemberCount` FROM mall_user mall_user WHERE mall_user.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_user.`member_flag` = '1' AND mall_user.`member_time` IS NOT NULL AND mall_user.`member_time` >= #{beginTime} AND mall_user.`member_time` < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(mall_user.`member_time`) ) member_stat ON member_stat.`statDate` = date_list.`stat_date` ORDER BY date_list.`stat_date` ASC

SELECT mall_order_item.`spu_id` AS `spuId`, MAX(mall_order_item.`spu_name`) AS `spuName`, MAX(mall_order_item.`pic_url`) AS `picUrl`, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(mall_order_item.`quantity`, 0)), 0) AS `saleQuantity`, COUNT(DISTINCT mall_order_item.`order_id`) AS `paidOrderCount`, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(mall_order_item.`payment_price`, 0)), 0) AS `paidAmount` FROM mall_order_item mall_order_item INNER JOIN mall_order_info mall_order_info ON mall_order_info.`id` = mall_order_item.`order_id` WHERE mall_order_item.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_order_info.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_order_info.`is_pay` = '1' AND mall_order_info.`payment_time` IS NOT NULL AND mall_order_info.`payment_time` >= #{beginTime} GROUP BY mall_order_item.`spu_id` ORDER BY `saleQuantity` DESC, `paidAmount` DESC LIMIT #{limit}
